title: lagocodes cernua
intro: Lagocodes cernua, also known as creeping saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lagocodes cernua include reducing fever, treating wounds, and easing digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
